commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ed4a672aa217c93465ae727a69bf4f00c75e381b)
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the visual prompt and render path to suppress empty `## Maintainer ruling` fields while preserving populated ruling fields, with focused unit coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main instructs the visual model to emit the maintainer-ruling footer and `renderVisualComment` posts the body after trimming. I did not run a live visual command in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real behavior proof, not a concrete code repair for ClawSweeper to queue.

target.title: fix: suppress empty visual ruling fields
target.body:
## Summary

- suppress empty maintainer-ruling fields before posting visual brief comments
- keep concrete maintainer-ruling fields when the visual output actually fills them
- update the visual prompt so the footer is only requested when it has concrete content

Fixes https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/issues/215

## Validation

- ./node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p tsconfig.json
- ./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/clawsweeper.ts test/clawsweeper.test.ts
- node --test test/clawsweeper.test.ts
- GIT_CONFIG_COUNT=1 GIT_CONFIG_KEY_0=commit.gpgsign GIT_CONFIG_VALUE_0=false npm_config_cache=/private/tmp/clawsweeper-npm-cache npx pnpm@10.33.2 run check
target.author: takhoffman

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
